//@version=6
strategy("Project Montauk Candidate - Golden Cross + Slope (T0)",
     overlay=true,
     shorttitle="GCSlope",
     initial_capital=1000,
     default_qty_type=strategy.percent_of_equity,
     default_qty_value=100,
     pyramiding=0,
     commission_type=strategy.commission.percent,
     commission_value=0.05,
     slippage=0,
     calc_on_every_tick=false,
     process_orders_on_close=true)

// Generated by scripts/pine_generator.py
// Source strategy family: golden_cross_slope

fastLen      = input.int(50, "Fast EMA", minval=1, group="1 - Inputs")
slowLen      = input.int(200, "Slow EMA", minval=1, group="1 - Inputs")
slopeWindow  = input.int(5, "Slow EMA Slope Window", minval=1, group="1 - Inputs")
entryBars    = input.int(3, "Entry Confirm Bars", minval=1, group="1 - Inputs")
cooldownBars = input.int(5, "Cooldown Bars", minval=0, group="1 - Inputs")

fastEma = ta.ema(close, fastLen)
slowEma = ta.ema(close, slowLen)
slowRising = not na(slowEma) and not na(slowEma[slopeWindow]) and slowEma > slowEma[slopeWindow]
golden = not na(fastEma) and not na(slowEma) and fastEma > slowEma

var int bullCount = 0
if golden and slowRising
    bullCount += 1
else
    bullCount := 0

entrySignal = bullCount == entryBars
crossDown = not na(fastEma) and not na(slowEma) and not na(fastEma[1]) and not na(slowEma[1]) and fastEma[1] >= slowEma[1] and fastEma < slowEma

var int lastSellBar = na
if strategy.position_size > 0 and crossDown
    strategy.close("Long")
    lastSellBar := bar_index
    label.new(bar_index, high, "Death Cross", yloc=yloc.abovebar, style=label.style_label_down, color=color.red, textcolor=color.white, size=size.tiny)

canEnter = strategy.position_size == 0 and (na(lastSellBar) or (bar_index - lastSellBar) > cooldownBars)
if entrySignal and canEnter
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)

plot(fastEma, "Fast EMA (50)", color=color.new(color.green, 30), linewidth=2)
plot(slowEma, "Slow EMA (200)", color=color.new(color.blue, 30), linewidth=2)

riskState = strategy.position_size > 0 ? 1 : 0
riskOn = riskState == 1
riskOff = riskState == 0
riskOnFlip = ta.change(riskState) > 0
riskOffFlip = ta.change(riskState) < 0

plot(riskState, "Risk State", color=color.new(color.gray, 100), display=display.data_window)
alertcondition(riskOnFlip, "Risk On", "Project Montauk risk_state=risk_on")
alertcondition(riskOffFlip, "Risk Off", "Project Montauk risk_state=risk_off")
